request:
You are a release-install parity reviewer. Read-only. You only need to answer whether these completion-plan requirements are adequate: fresh install must clone/update app+data refs, verify refs against origin, configure Codex/Claude MCP+hooks where clients exist, guide but not bypass hook trust, create Observatory/diagnostic/live-proof/uninstall launchers, make reinstall idempotent and refuse unsafe overwrite, treat Git-missing ZIP fallback as degraded not equivalent, require release manifest with app/data commits, installer/package version, ZIP SHA, tag target, GitHub asset metadata, and required verifier statuses. Verdict? Respond with exactly these five lines:
reviewer_id=install_release_parity
verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED
blocking_objections=[]
required_doc_changes=[]
evidence_files=[docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md,docs/OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md,docs/INSTALL.md,docs/VERIFICATION.md]

gates.reason: The request or hook input was marked sensitive.
gates.safe_action: Do not store secrets or raw full transcripts; keep sync blocked until review.

gates.reason: The request may delete or reset durable data.
gates.safe_action: Require explicit confirmation and a backup/sync risk check before destructive execution.

gates.reason: The request touches sync, release, deployment, or backup behavior.
gates.safe_action: Run git_sync dry-run or installer/version alignment checks before publishing.

gates.reason: Every started OS task must be closed with finish_task.
gates.safe_action: Keep the task visible as active/pending until finish_task writes a trace.
